name: Choropleth Map
description: Polished geographic choropleth with minimalist cartographic style, clean borders, and sequential color palette.
template:
Create a polished geographic choropleth map showing {prompt}

Style requirements:
- Off-white background with muted terrain hints
- Sequential palette from pale sand to deep color
- Minimalist cartographic style
- Clearly separated regions with clean borders
- Crisp labels and right-side legend
- Publication-grade infographic clarity
- Subtle cartographic detail with balanced composition

Density control:
- 8-16 distinct regions/districts
- Clean borders with crisp labels
- Compact legend with 4-5 color steps
- Annotation boxes for highest/lowest values
